tagline: A parasite-host symbiosis system where consciousness negotiation determines survival — and Gotou's economic efficiency outpaces violence.
visualizationReason: Parasyte's core conflict is not combat but biological optimization: parasites and humans compete for the same resource (survival) through different strategies, with Gotou's economic approach being the ultimate threat.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: I'm Migi. And you're mine now.
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: PARASYTE DETECTION ACTIVE — CONSCIOUSNESS NEGOTIATION IN PROGRESS

hero.microHook: Neither ally nor enemy — we simply share the same body.
hero.thesis: Parasyte's thesis is symbiosis vs. competition: Migi and Shinichi's cooperative relationship represents the only successful partial integration model, while Gotou's hive-mind represents the competitive optimum.

powerSystem.name: Parasite Physiology
powerSystem.subtitle: Body-Hijack Capable Organism
powerSystem.loreDesc: Parasytes are alien parasites that take over the right hand of hosts, granting enhanced physical capabilities.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A body-control system: the parasite replaces motor control of a specific body part, granting superhuman physical stats.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Migi first manifesting to save Shinichi from the Yakuza.

powerSystem.name: Migi Combat
powerSystem.subtitle: Parasite Combat Intelligence
powerSystem.loreDesc: Migi can analyze and counter other parasites' biological attack patterns using his own parasite physiology.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A pattern-recognition combat system: real-time analysis of opponent biology to exploit weaknesses.

rankings.systemName: Kiseijuu: Sei No Kakuritsu Power Hierarchy
rankings.topTierLore: The supreme capability tier in Kiseijuu: Sei no Kakuritsu.
rankings.topTierSystem: Maximum capability across all measured dimensions.

tiers.name: A-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Exceptional capability holders with system-shaping influence.

tiers.name: B-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Competent operators with meaningful impact potential.

factions.name: Kiseijuu: Sei No Kakuritsu Universe
factions.loreDesc: The primary world of the story.

rules.name: Parasites Need Hosts to Survive
rules.loreDesc: Parasites cannot survive without a host body — they need human physiology to function in this world.
rules.systemDesc: A dependency constraint: parasite capability requires host integration.

rules.name: Symbiosis Is Economically Optimal
rules.loreDesc: The Migi-Shinichi cooperative model produces better outcomes than competitive parasite approaches.
rules.systemDesc: A cooperative advantage: partial integration outperforms both full-host-takeover and pure-competition models.

anomalies.name: Unique Capability
anomalies.loreDesc: The protagonist possesses a capability that transcends normal system rules.
anomalies.systemDesc: A system anomaly: Parasyte's thesis is symbiosis vs. competition: Mi...
anomalies.impact: Creates asymmetric advantage against normal opponents.

systemQuestions.question: What makes Kiseijuu: Sei no Kakuritsu's system unique?
systemQuestions.answer: A parasite-host symbiosis system where consciousness negotiation determines survival — and Gotou's economic efficiency outpaces violence.
